project.name: henrybpan.github.io
project.description: Personal brand website. Single-page cinematic experience centered on an interactive business card inspired by the American Psycho (2000) Patrick Bateman scene. The card is the entire homepage — front shows identity, back reveals navigation.

stack.generator: None — pure flat HTML, Jekyll removed
stack.css: Vanilla CSS, inline <style> blocks, CSS custom properties, no preprocessor
stack.javascript: Vanilla ES5 IIFE, zero dependencies, zero frameworks
stack.fonts: Google Fonts — Cormorant Garamond (300/400/500/600) + EB Garamond (400/500)
stack.build: None — GitHub Pages serves files directly

fileStructure.index.html: Homepage. Cinematic card experience. All CSS and JS inline.
fileStructure.work-with-me/index.html: Work with Me page — WIP placeholder, blank
fileStructure..nojekyll: Empty file — disables Jekyll processing on GitHub Pages

urlStructure.note: Directory-based routing (folder/index.html). GitHub Pages resolves /path to /path/index.html automatically. No trailing slash or .html extension needed in links.

colors.--card-text-primary: #1C1A17 — near-black warm (name, nav items on hover)
colors.--card-text-secondary: #3A3530 — dark warm brown (title, nav items default, email hover)
colors.rationale: Background #0F0E0C is color-theory chosen: the warm brown undertone harmonizes with the bone card rather than creating a sterile cold contrast. Analogous warm palette throughout.

typography.displayFont: Cormorant Garamond — used for card name, card title, nav links, WIP page titles
typography.bodyFont: EB Garamond — used for card email, card bottom text, hint text, back links
typography.cardBaseFontSize: clamp(9.5px, card-width / 38.5, 13.5px) — scales proportionally with card at every viewport

spacing.cardPadding: 5.6% top, 6.8% sides, 5.0% bottom — percentage-based, scales with card
spacing.cardWidth: min(520px, 88vw) — never overflows, responsive at any screen size

shadows.card: 4-layer box shadow (1px, 12px, 32px, 72px) + inset 0.5px edge highlight. Simulates card resting on dark surface.
shadows.vignette: radial-gradient overlay on body::after, 75% ellipse, transparent center to rgba(0,0,0,0.5) edges

animation.wipPageEntry: up keyframe: translateY(12px) + opacity 0→1, 0.75s same easing

cardDesign.inspiration: Patrick Bateman business card, American Psycho (2000)

front.center: HENRY PAN (h1, tracked uppercase) + Social Media Growth (small caps)

back.layout: Left-aligned vertical nav list, vertically centered in card
back.dividers: 0.5px border-top on first item, border-bottom on all but last

socialIcons.note: URLs use henrybpan as username — verify handles are correct before launching

flipBehavior.desktop: Pure CSS :hover on .card-scene with @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine). Zero JS on desktop.
flipBehavior.mobile: JS toggles .is-flipped class on .card-scene. Guards: (1) hover-capable devices skip JS handler; (2) taps on <a> elements navigate rather than toggle
flipBehavior.hint: hint-desktop / hint-mobile shown via @media (hover: hover). Fades out on first interaction via .is-gone class.
flipBehavior.reducedMotion: transition: none on .card-inner, animation: none on .scene

wipPages.design: Dark background (#0F0E0C), page title at rgba(237,232,222,0.28), 'Work in Progress' at rgba(237,232,222,0.1), back link at rgba(237,232,222,0.22)
wipPages.status: All four pages are intentionally blank — shell only

removedFromPreviousSite: context.json — old project docs (replaced by this file)
nextSteps: Verify Instagram, YouTube, and X handles match actual accounts
Add og:title, og:description, og:image meta tags to index.html for link previews
Add a minimal SVG favicon (HP monogram or similar)
Fill in about/index.html first — highest-value page to complete
work-with-me page could be a simple email CTA or embedded Typeform
Consider adding a subtle page transition when navigating from card back to inner pages

conventions.cssOrganization: Inline <style> blocks per page, sectioned with === SECTION === comments
conventions.jsOrganization: IIFE pattern, 'use strict', vanilla ES5-compatible syntax
conventions.fontLoading: Google Fonts with preconnect hints, display=swap implied
conventions.accessibility: role=button + tabindex=0 on card, aria-label on card scene and icons, aria-hidden on decorative SVGs, focus-visible outline
conventions.performance: GPU-only animation (transform + opacity), will-change scoped to .card-inner, percentage-based padding avoids JS layout reads
